breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 1.0 GENERAL
text: 1.0 GENERAL

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 1.0 GENERAL > Clause 1.1 This requisition together with the burner data sheet and specifications attached to this
text:
1.1 This requisition together with the burner data sheet and specifications attached to this
requisition forms the minimum requirements for the selection, design, engineering,
manufacture, material, packing and supply of components for existing burners.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 1.0 GENERAL > Clause 1.2 Any conflict between the requirements contained in this requisition, data sheets, sketches
text:
1.2 Any conflict between the requirements contained in this requisition, data sheets, sketches
and specifications attached to this requisition shall be brought to the immediate attention of
the purchaser for resolution.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 1.0 GENERAL > Clause 1.3 Under no circumstances may the bidder present deviations and/or alternatives by means of
text:
1.3 Under no circumstances may the bidder present deviations and/or alternatives by means of
sending documents required “for review” to the purchaser.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES
text: 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.1 Necessary modified burner oil guns for 24 Nos. FD, Tri-fuel fired, Low NOx, round flame
text:
2.1 Necessary modified burner oil guns for 24 Nos. FD, Tri-fuel fired, Low NOx, round flame
burners of BPCL-Mumbai Refinery CDU-3 Heater 131-F-101. Bidder shall supply 24 oil
guns for regular Heater operation.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.2 In addition to the gas tips for Heater operation, OEM to supply:
text: 2.2 In addition to the gas tips for Heater operation, OEM to supply:

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.2.1 8 nos oil tip assembly (including cone tip, outer tip, mixing core and
text:
2.2.1 8 nos oil tip assembly (including cone tip, outer tip, mixing core and
sleeve) as spares.
2.2.2 Consumables / soft spares (like gaskets, O-ring etc.) required for carrying
out the burner modification work at site. [If required]

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.3 OEM to provide detail modification and site execution procedure for removal of old
text:
2.3 OEM to provide detail modification and site execution procedure for removal of old
oil gun from the existing burner and insertion guidelines / critical points for the new gun.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.4 Third party inspection of the burner components (Refer clause 6.0).
text: 2.4 Third party inspection of the burner components (Refer clause 6.0).

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.5 Packing, forwarding of oil guns and tip assembly. (Refer clause 8.0).
text: 2.5 Packing, forwarding of oil guns and tip assembly. (Refer clause 8.0).

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.6 Transportation of oil guns and tip assembly upto BPCL Mumbai Refinery job site.
text: 2.6 Transportation of oil guns and tip assembly upto BPCL Mumbai Refinery job site.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.7 Review/ supervision of installed burner components at site (considering experienced /
text:
2.7 Review/ supervision of installed burner components at site (considering experienced /
skilled qualified Indian representative ) and supervision of the oil gun / tip assembly
removal and replacement work (to be performed by others). OEM ’s qualified Indian
Representative shall continuously monitor the modification work and certify the same
upon completion to meet OEM ’s guarantees .

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.8 Assistance during commissioning/ burner start-up at site (considering experienced / skilled
text:
2.8 Assistance during commissioning/ burner start-up at site (considering experienced / skilled
qualified Indian representative) on per diem basis.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 2.0 SCOPE OF SUPPLY AND SERVICES > Clause 2.9 Drawings and documents as per VDR no. C238-131-80-45-VDR-0001 for all supplies and
text:
2.9 Drawings and documents as per VDR no. C238-131-80-45-VDR-0001 for all supplies and
services.

text: 3.1 Brief description of the heaters is noted below for general reference of the OEM .

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM):
text: 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM):

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.1 Existing CDU-3 Heater of BPCL-MR is provided with total 24 nos. Low NOx, FD, round
text:
4.1 Existing CDU-3 Heater of BPCL-MR is provided with total 24 nos. Low NOx, FD, round
flame, tri-fuel fired burners supplied by M/s OEM (HCEL) vide Order ref. GUED0190 in
the year 2002. As part of the capacity and reliability improvement project, CDU-3 heater is
being revamped to a higher capacity. Subsequent to higher capacity operation anticipated,
the heat duty of existing oil guns are required to be enhanced by 10%.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.2 It is required to modify the existing burners to suit the revamp objective as stated in clause
text: 4.2 It is required to modify the existing burners to suit the revamp objective as stated in clause

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.1 As a part of this modification, following changes are envisaged:
text:
4.1. As a part of this modification, following changes are envisaged:
a) Supply of new oil guns complete with all components and auxiliaries.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.3 No change allowed in the existing burner floor cutout and the burner fuel oil / atomising
text:
4.3 No change allowed in the existing burner floor cutout and the burner fuel oil / atomising
steam connection flanges and locations.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.4 OEM to ensure that the new oil guns can be retrofitted into the existing oil gun flanges
text:
4.4 OEM to ensure that the new oil guns can be retrofitted into the existing oil gun flanges
post removal of the oil guns currently installed. Size of the new oil guns should fit into the
existing burner oil gun flanges / sleeves and shall not require any modification in the
burner front plate assembly.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.5 OEM shall limit flame dimensions as in the original supply. Burner flame dia shall be 1m
text:
4.5 OEM shall limit flame dimensions as in the original supply. Burner flame dia shall be 1m
maximum with maximum allowed flame length as 5.5m.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.6 OEM shall provide a detail modification procedure for removal of the oil gun assembly
text:
4.6 OEM shall provide a detail modification procedure for removal of the oil gun assembly
from the existing burners. Actual modification work shall be performed by others,
however, OEM Qualifed Indian Representative shall supervise and monitor this
modification work on continuous basis during shutdown and certify the same upon
completion to meet OEM ’s guarantees.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.7 Transportation of oil guns and spares to BPCL-MR job site shall be in OEM ’s scope .
text: 4.7 Transportation of oil guns and spares to BPCL-MR job site shall be in OEM ’s scope .

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.8 The safe handling procedure and precaution requirement shall be clearly spelt out in the
text:
4.8 The safe handling procedure and precaution requirement shall be clearly spelt out in the
installation, operation and maintenance manual to ensure that the components are safe and
intact during transport, installation and handling.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.9 TPI of the new oil guns and spares shall be arranged by OEM considering reputed TPI
text:
4.9 TPI of the new oil guns and spares shall be arranged by OEM considering reputed TPI
agency. OEM shall include a separate line item specifying the TPI quotes.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.10 OEM shall submit the filled in vendor Drawings/Documents submission schedule along
text:
4.10 OEM shall submit the filled in vendor Drawings/Documents submission schedule along
with first revision of drawings/GAD within 15 days of release of LOI/FOI.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.11 The guaranteed period clause of Standard Specification No. 6-17-0008 Rev.5 shall get
text:
4.11 The guaranteed period clause of Standard Specification No. 6-17-0008 Rev.5 shall get
superseded by GPC and other commercial terms.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.12 OEM shall provide the modified general arrangement drawings and updated datasheets/
text:
4.12 OEM shall provide the modified general arrangement drawings and updated datasheets/
documents clearly indicating the components being replaced/ modified.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.13 OEM to note that sequence of document submission / review at post order stage shall be as
text:
4.13 OEM to note that sequence of document submission / review at post order stage shall be as
follows:
- Document submission schedule
- Review of burner datasheets, draft loss curves and capacity curves.
- Review of assembly removal / re-insertion procedure.
- GAD review / finalization.
- Documentary evidence of source/ place of supply and material original certificates.
- Submission of Installation, operation & maintenance manual
- Submission of final documents / data dossier.
OEM shall strictly adhere to the above sequence. However, complete set of documents as
per VDR are to be submitted for review.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.14 Since the components identified for replacement are critical, hence same shall be
text:
4.14 Since the components identified for replacement are critical, hence same shall be
manufactured & supplied from EIL approved facility. Documentary evidence of supply
source for these components shall be provided by OEM.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 4.0 INSTRUCTIONS TO VENDOR (OEM): > Clause 4.15 OEM to ensure that Manday charges for the supervision services shall be separately quoted
text:
4.15 OEM to ensure that Manday charges for the supervision services shall be separately quoted
per man day for 7 days for all days of week during shutdown including over time charges.
OEM to also ensure that per diem charges shall be inclusive of charges for Travel (air
travel by economy class within India, local conveyance etc.) accommodation and food etc.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 5.0 GUARANTEE:
text: 5.0 GUARANTEE:

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 5.0 GUARANTEE:
text:
Burner should be guaranteed for performance and workmanship as detailed in clause no. 6
of Burner Standard Specification no. 6-17-0008 Rev.5.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 6.0 INSPECTION :
text: 6.0 INSPECTION :

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 6.0 INSPECTION :
text:
6.1 Inspection shall be carried out by a reputed third party inspection agency, based on
approved vendor documents per VDR, as per clause no. 5 of Burner Specification no. 6-
17-0008 rev.5 at the supplier's work before dispatch. OEM shall arrange for third party
inspection of the new oil guns and spares.
Any rejection made by the inspection authority will be final. However, his inspection will
in no way release the supplier from the guarantee as to materials, design, workmanship and
performance of the equipments inspected by him.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 6.0 INSPECTION : > Clause 6.2 All test reports, material certificates etc. duly certified by third party agency shall be
text:
6.2 All test reports, material certificates etc. duly certified by third party agency shall be
submitted by supplier for purchaser's records.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 6.0 INSPECTION : > Clause 6.3 Third party inspection agency shall certify the dispatch documents.
text: 6.3 Third party inspection agency shall certify the dispatch documents.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 6.0 INSPECTION : > Clause 6.4 Third party inspection agency shall also issue the release order after ensuring compliance
text:
6.4 Third party inspection agency shall also issue the release order after ensuring compliance
to requisition / approved documents as well as scope of supply including spares and
various documents.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 7.0 PAINTING
text: 7.0 PAINTING

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 7.0 PAINTING
text: Burner components shall be painted with heat resistant paint as per supplier’s standard.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 8.0 PACKING & SHIPPING
text: 8.0 PACKING & SHIPPING

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 8.0 PACKING & SHIPPING
text:
Transportation to BPCL-M R job site shall be in OEM’s scope.
Packing and shipping shall be detailed in clause no. 10.0 of Burner Specification no. 6-17-
0008 rev.5, in addition to the clauses given below:

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 8.0 PACKING & SHIPPING > Clause 8.1 Equipment shall be packed as per the requirements of Roadworthy/Seaworthy Packing.
text:
8.1 Equipment shall be packed as per the requirements of Roadworthy/Seaworthy Packing.
The burner components shall be adequately packed inside plastic covers for transportation
/ handling and suitable for opening at dockside/site for inspection.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 8.0 PACKING & SHIPPING > Clause 8.2 Internals of all burner components and machined surfaces shall be protected from material
text:
8.2 Internals of all burner components and machined surfaces shall be protected from material
corrosion with internal plastic envelopes, which will protect the equipment for a period of
12 months outdoor storage.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 8.0 PACKING & SHIPPING > Clause 8.3 All flanged facings shall be protected by wooden or metal covers which shall be securely
text:
8.3 All flanged facings shall be protected by wooden or metal covers which shall be securely
fastened to flange to prevent any entry of foreign matter and damage to flange.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 8.0 PACKING & SHIPPING > Clause 8.4 All threaded connections on burner components shall be protected by installing solid bar
text:
8.4 All threaded connections on burner components shall be protected by installing solid bar
stock plugs. When alloy equipment with threaded opening is protected in this manner,
choice of bar stock & material shall be such that galling of the equipment is prevented.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 8.0 PACKING & SHIPPING > Clause 8.5 The safe handling procedure and precaution requirement shall be clearly spelt out in the
text:
8.5 The safe handling procedure and precaution requirement shall be clearly spelt out in the
installation, operation and maintenance manual or in a separate manual to ensure that the
components are safe and intact during transport, installation and handling.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 9.0 CORRESPONDENCE AND DOCUMENTATION
text: 9.0 CORRESPONDENCE AND DOCUMENTATION

text:
9.1 OEM shall furnish drawings/ documents/ data as detailed as per VDR (C238-131-80-45-
VDR-0001) at various stages of execution of the job.

breadcrumb: SPECIFICATION FOR PROCUREMENT OF BURNER OIL GUNS UNIT : CDU-3 (131) > 9.0 CORRESPONDENCE AND DOCUMENTATION > Clause 9.2 In addition to this, soft copies of all final as-built drawings are to be supplied.
text: 9.2 In addition to this, soft copies of all final as-built drawings are to be supplied.

text: A. PROJECT : CAPACITY / RELIABILITY IMPROVEMENT PROJECT
